zh.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby是Richard de Kyrkeby I的兒子，於1322年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可比。他於大約1368年與Lady Isabella Bardsey在英國英格蘭藍卡爾吉可比-易-福內斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年在他的家鄉享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby是Richard de Kyrkeby I的儿子，于1322年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉可比。他于大约1368年与Lady Isabella Bardsey在英国英格兰藍卡爾吉可比-易-福內斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年在他的家乡享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kirkby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kirby
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in northern and eastern England called Kirby or Kirkby, from Old Norse kirkja ‘church’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.
Irish: adopted for Ó Garmhaic ‘descendant of Cíarmhac’, a personal name meaning ‘dark son’. Compare Kerwick .
Irish: Anglicized form of Mac Geirble ‘son of Geirble’, a personal name of uncertain origin. The name is preserved in the townland name of Carrowkeribly in County Mayo.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby was born in 1322, in Kirkby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Richard de Kyrkeby I. He married Lady Isabella Bardsey about 1368, in Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1387, in his hometown, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby est né en 1322, à Kirkby, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Richard de Kyrkeby I. Il a épousé Lady Isabella Bardsey environ 1368, à Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1387, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby wurde 1322 in Kirkby, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Richard de Kyrkeby I geboren. Er hat um 1368 in Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Lady Isabella Bardsey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1387 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby è nato il nel 1322 nel Kirkby, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Richard de Kyrkeby I. Lui sposato Lady Isabella Bardsey circa 1368, nel Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1387, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkbyは1322年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアキルクビーでRichard de Kyrkeby Iの息子として生まれた。約1368年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアキルクブイ-イン-ファーネスでLady Isabella Bardseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年に故郷で65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby(은)는 1322년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커k비에서 Richard de Kyrkeby I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1368년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 커k비-이-퍼네스에서 Lady Isabella Bardsey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby nasceu em 1322, em Kirkby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Richard de Kyrkeby I. Ele casou-se com Lady Isabella Bardsey aproximadamente 1368, em Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1387, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby родился в 1322 г. в местности киркби, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Richard de Kyrkeby I. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Isabella Bardsey около 1368 г. в местности киркби-ин-фурнесс, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1387 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Kirkby nació en 1322, en Kirkby, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hijo de Richard de Kyrkeby I. Se casó con Lady Isabella Bardsey aproximadamente 1368, en Kirkby-in-Furness, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1387, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años.
